{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":59798,"duration_api_ms":391791,"num_turns":7,"result":"Phase 5 완료. 아래 작업이 반영되었습니다:

- `OfficeContactCard`, `StaffContactCard`: 모든 `urgent ? ... : ...` 조건부 스타일 제거 → 원래의 `bg-white border border-gray-200` / `text-gray-*` 토큰으로 통일. `const urgent` 변수만 긴급 배지 렌더 조건으로 유지.
- 두 Worker 카드에 `Siren` 아이콘 + `bg-red-600 text-white` 긴급 배지 (`data-testid="urgent-badge"`) 신규 추가.
- Admin `ContactCardHeader`: 상태 배지 바로 뒤에 동일 규격 긴급 배지 overlay 삽입.
- Worker 카드 테스트: `bg-red-500` 미적용 / `bg-white` 적용 / Siren SVG + "긴급" 렌더 / `is_urgent=false` 미렌더 3건씩 추가. `downloadLatestDrawing` 모킹 보강.
- AC 3종 (`pnpm build`, `npx tsc --noEmit`, `jest`) 전부 통과 → `index.json` phase 5 `status: "completed"` 갱신 후 `feat(contact-feedback-pack): phase 5 — urgent-siren-overlay` 로 커밋 (`d45aa317`).","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"81841610-094a-43f0-a532-8918ad910e11","total_cost_usd":4.713031999999998,"usage":{"input_tokens":12,"cache_creation_input_tokens":12866,"cache_read_input_tokens":824770,"output_tokens":2687,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":12866,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":482,"cache_read_input_tokens":127046,"cache_creation_input_tokens":342,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":342},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-7[1m]":{"inputTokens":95,"outputTokens":31311,"cacheReadInputTokens":5606389,"cacheCreationInputTokens":180254,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":4.713031999999998,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"14d8ba75-c631-40d3-b030-6d650c24f641"}
